ops.note: start page staged before capture: the Zoho Desk integration page
pre-roll: preflight staged the persisted settings submenu expanded (washcentral-sidebar-collapsed-v5=false); abort the take if collapsed
pre-roll: persisted washcentral-settings-menu-v1 all-false (every settings group collapsed) staged by preflight, so the Integrations entry sits at the bottom of the rail in frame (y651)
pre-roll: the Integrations rail entry must be on screen for step 1 and for every genuine hub navigation click; abort otherwise
shot-list load check: real tiles + chips, no agent-service error state
enter from the bottom-left beside the settings rail as p01 opens on 'its own page under Settings'
p02 'The breadcrumb confirms where you are' — sweep up to the breadcrumb
p03 'the Integrations entry at the bottom of the left rail is the way in' — down to the rail entry (never clicked here)
p04 'We start on Zoho Desk' — ease toward the Zoho header/title
park over the page for the p05 tail
step 2 cue p06 'Start at the top' — approach the header identity block
p07 'The badge next to the title says what the integration is for'
p08-p09 'the pill... Not Configured means nothing is wired up'
ease off for the p10 tail 'One glance, and you already know the connection state'
step 3 cue p11 'Under the title, three small chips'
slow left-to-right chip sweep begins
p12 'how WashCentral would talk to the vendor'
ease off over p14-p15 'watch them change as we tour the other pages'
step 4 guardrail: neither Test Connection nor Edit Configuration is ever clicked — the page must not change or navigate
step 4 cue p16 'Top right, two buttons, and we touch neither' — rest BELOW Test Connection, never on it
p17 'Test Connection fires a live call out to the vendor' — point from beside; do-not-click ring above
p18 'Edit Configuration opens the credential editor' — point from beside, never on it
ease away on p20-p21 'reading never requires a click up here'
step 5 cue p22 'Now the tile strip'
p23-p24 slow sweep across the four tiles in spoken order: connection,
data center,
org ID,
and which way data syncs
p25 'Notice Connection reads Not set, which agrees with the pill above'
ease off for the p26 tail
step 6 cue p27 'Below the tiles, two tabs'
p28 'Settings, the one that's open, holds the live field values'
p29-p30 'Instructions... we leave it closed today' — pointed at, never clicked
p31 'Everything we need sits on the Settings tab'
step 7 cue p32 'Scroll into the credentials group' (the group is already in frame; no engine scroll)
p33 'Client I-D, secrets, tokens, expiry' — sweep down the credential labels
down to Token Expiry
p34-p36 'read the labels, never the values' — rest beside the (empty) field labels; no value is ever read
hold over the credentials group for the p37 rule
step 8 cue p38 'Keep scrolling' — move down to the operational group headers (all in frame; Mapping sits below the fold — see residuals)
p40 'General turns it on, Routing picks a default department and assignee'
p41 'Sync sets the direction, and Mapping ties Zoho's statuses' (Mapping named; its header is below the 1080 fold)
ease off for p42-p43 'the same skeleton wearing different names'
step 9 cue p44 'Now Microsoft Entra I-D' — approach the Integrations rail entry to open the hub
genuine navigation: the Integrations rail entry is a plain <a href=settings-integrations.html> (pure navigation, no mutation) — opens the integrations hub
on the hub, head to the Microsoft Entra ID card
genuine navigation: the hub card is a plain <a href=settings-integrations-entra.html> — opens the Entra page (p46 will describe it)
SSO page loaded: badge, chips, and four tiles present, no agent-service error
p46 'The badge now reads single sign-on, the chips describe Microsoft's method'
p47 'the tiles track the issuer, client I-D, and scopes'
p48-p49 name the redirect U-R-I + Copy button, which sit below the 1080 fold (residual) — ease off over the header
step 10 cue p50 'Google, Okta, Cognito' — back to the Integrations rail to reopen the hub
genuine navigation back to the integrations hub, where Google, Okta and Cognito appear as cards
p52 'Only the name and the method chips change from page to page' — sweep the three SSO cards
p53 'and every one of them sits at Not Configured here'
ease off for p54-p55 'Learn the Entra page and you have learned all four'
step 11 cue p56 'SCIM, pronounced skim' — head to the SCIM Provisioning card (still on the hub)
genuine navigation: hub card <a href=settings-integrations-scim.html>
SCIM page loaded: four tiles + an empty Sync Log group, no error
p59 'The tiles track its status and last event'
p60 'and the sync log below stays empty until provisioning events start arriving'
step 12 cue p61 'On to accounting. Open Sage' — back to the rail to reopen the hub
genuine navigation to the hub
head to the Sage card
genuine navigation: hub card <a href=settings-integrations-sage.html>
Sage page loaded: badge, chips, four tiles incl the Sync Schedule cron tile
p63-p64 'The sync schedule tile shows a cron value... two in the morning here, not on every sale'
p65-p66 'the safety group's dry run flag' — the Safety/Dry Run group sits below the fold (residual); rest over the SYNC group instead
ease off for the p66 tail
step 13 cue p67 'QuickBooks Online, the other ledger' — back to the rail to reopen the hub
genuine navigation to the hub
head to the QuickBooks Online card
genuine navigation: hub card <a href=settings-integrations-quickbooks.html>
QuickBooks page loaded: badge, chips, four tiles incl the Realm tile
p68 'Same badge, same subtitle, different vendor' (QuickBooks is up just as p68 lands)
p69 'Its credentials add a realm, which is QuickBooks' name for the company I-D'
ease off for p71-p72 'the same pattern you just saw across the four sign-on providers'
step 14 cue p73 'Back to Zoho for the read that matters' — back to the rail to reopen the hub
genuine navigation to the hub
head to the Zoho Desk card
genuine navigation back to Zoho Desk for the recap
recap guardrail: Test Connection is pointed at but never clicked — the page must not change
recap read 1 (p75) 'the status pill'
recap read 2 (p76) 'then Test Connection, remembering an admin runs it, not you' — point from beside, never on it
recap read 3 (p77) 'then token expiry in the credentials'
settle for the p78 close 'without filing a bug'
final: still on the Zoho recap page, nothing was clicked

highlights.note: p02 'The breadcrumb confirms where you are'
p03 'the Integrations entry at the bottom of the left rail is the way in'
p07 the Help Desk Integration badge
step 4 do-not-click guardrail on Test Connection (p16-p17)
step 4 do-not-click guardrail on Edit Configuration (p18)
p24 four-tile sweep in spoken order
p25 'Connection reads Not set, which agrees with the pill above'
p34-p37 'read the labels, never the values' (fields empty in this demo tenant)
p47 issuer / client ID / scopes tiles
p53 Cognito card, all Not Configured
p63-p64 the Sync Schedule cron tile
p68 Accounting method chips (Accounting / OAuth 2.0 / REST API)
p69 the Realm tile (QuickBooks' company ID)
recap read 2 (p76) Test Connection do-not-click guardrail — an admin runs it, not you
recap read 3 (p77) token expiry in the credentials

camera.note: step 2 close framing (150% per shot list) on the Not Configured pill
wide for chips, buttons and tiles
step 7 close framing on the CREDENTIALS group labels
step 8 pan down to the operational group headers (kept within the 1080 frame)
pull wide for the hub navigation to Entra
step 9 frame the Entra header, chips and tile row
wide for the hub (SSO provider cards) and the SCIM page
step 12 frame the Sage tile row incl the Sync Schedule cron tile
step 13 frame the QuickBooks tiles incl Realm
wide and calm for the Zoho recap
